pages.title: What To Do
pages.text: Goal: push into high-risk fights and prepare the Netherite route. Diamond upgrades your combat ceiling with $(l)怒$() retaliation bursts and $(l)隐$() disengage stealth.

pages.title: Stage Exit
pages.text: Gold has diamond-tier effects but very low durability, and it is an endpoint branch. Gold 入 arenas can rarely drop $(l)Netherite Scrap$().$(br2)To progress normally, fill Diamond momentum, win $(l)劫$(), then upgrade to Netherite.
